title: Fix embed.js build failure — localEmbed import does not exist in agentic-embed
description:
BUILD IS BROKEN. src/runtime/embed.js calls agenticEmbed(text) with a bare string, but agentic-embed localEmbed() expects an array of texts.

Current code (WRONG):
  return agenticEmbed(text)

Required fix:
  const [embedding] = await agenticEmbed([text])
  return embedding

Test failures from test/m98-embed-build-fix.test.js (3 failures):
1. expects localEmbed([...]) — array argument, not bare string
2. expects const [result] = ... — destructure array result  
3. expects NOT agenticEmbed(text) — no bare string call

The localEmbed function signature is: localEmbed(texts, vocabSize=512) where texts is an array. It returns an array of embeddings, one per input text.

File to fix: src/runtime/embed.js (line 7)
This is P0 — 3 test failures blocking the build.

Latest test log confirms: 1 failed test file, 3 failed tests, 898 passed.
